submissions.title: Port Credit Buskerfest
submissions.location: Memorial Park, Lakeshore Rd, Port Credit
submissions.description: Buskers, food trucks, kid-friendly performers all weekend. Free admission.

submissions.title: Bronte Creek Maple Magic
submissions.description: Sugar-shack demos, pancake breakfast tent, sap-to-syrup walk. Park entry not included.

submissions.title: St. Christopher's spring fair
submissions.description: Bouncy castle, BBQ, silent auction. Raises funds for the playground refresh.
